field_changes.old:
JEFIT: The Ultimate Workout App, Gym Workout Planner & Workout Tracker

Achieve your fitness goals with JEFIT, the ultimate workout app, gym workout planner, and workout tracker built to help you get stronger every day. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned athlete, JEFIT gives you the tools to plan, track, and optimize every gym workout and training session—all within one powerful app.

The Top Workout App & Tracker for Gym Workouts & Strength Training
Workout Tracker: Log your gym sets, reps, and weights for efficient and structured strength training.

Custom Gym Workout Planner: Create a personalized gym workout plan or choose from thousands of routines to build muscle and get stronger.

One-Tap Workouts: Quickly generate goal-based workouts by muscle group, fitness level, or available time.

Progress Monitoring: Use the built-in workout tracker to visualize your strength gains and refine each gym workout.

Perfect for Gym-Goers: Stay consistent and focused through structured gym training sessions that adapt to your progress.

Extensive Exercise Library & Pre-Built Gym Workout Plans
1,500+ Exercises: Discover top gym exercises for weightlifting, bodyweight strength, and cardio.

850+ Gym Workout Plans: Pick a ready-made plan to build strength, burn fat, or improve endurance.

HD Video Guides: Learn proper form with detailed video tutorials for every gym workout movement.

Home & Gym Options: Whether training at home or in the gym, JEFIT adapts to your routine and goals.

Track Gym Training: Follow progressive overload, log each gym workout, and analyze results in real time. Enhanced with an AI-powered Progressive Overload system to guide consistent strength gains and long-term progress.

JEFIT offers a Watch App for workout tracking on Wear OS. Train hands-free by starting sets, logging reps, and monitoring progress directly from your smartwatch, keeping your focus on fitness instead of your phone.

Switch between pounds and kilograms depending on your gym, and keep your workouts synced automatically with your JEFIT account. It's built to make your gym sessions more efficient, so you can lift without distractions.

Quick Start Sets: Search, log, and sync your strength routines with ease.

Flexible Units: Switch between pounds or kilograms based on your gym’s setup.

Built for Gym Training: Easily manage your gym time and focus on lifting—not logging.

Join the JEFIT Fitness Community
13M+ Users: Train with a global network of lifters, athletes, and everyday gym-goers.

Share Your Strength: Post workout progress, gym milestones, and personal bests.

Strength Challenges: Stay motivated with community-driven gym workout challenges.

Trainer Support: Get expert input from coaches to enhance your gym sessions and results.

Why JEFIT Stands Out
Versatile Gym Training Support: From hypertrophy to HIIT, tailor your workout plan to fit any gym goal.

Smarter Tracking: Use detailed analytics from the workout tracker to stay strong and consistent.

Strong Community: Connect with others on the same journey and learn from top gym routines worldwide.

New Features:
Sync with Apple Health and Strava for an all-in-one workout app experience.

Review session analytics, optimize your gym workouts, and build strength more efficiently.

Download JEFIT now – The Workout App, Gym Workout Planner & Workout Tracker.
Start logging and optimizing your gym workouts today and unlock stronger results over time.

Ideal For: Gym enthusiasts, beginners, bodybuilders, athletes, and anyone focused on strength, fat loss, or endurance.

Start your 2026 fitness journey with a smarter New Year’s resolution. Whether your goal is to build muscle, get stronger, lose fat, or stay consistent, JEFIT helps you turn your New Year workout plan into real results!

Your Gym. Your Plan. Your Progress. Get Stronger with JEFIT.

Website: www.jefit.com
Instagram: @jefitapp
Reddit: www.reddit.com/r/jefit/
Support: support@jefit.com
field_changes.new:
#1 strength training workout app. JEFIT is the ultimate workout tracker to plan your weight training, log workouts, and track exercise progress.

Whether you want a simple gym log to track your weights and reps, or a smart, AI-guided routine that tells you exactly what to lift next—JEFIT makes your fitness journey easy, with zero guesswork. Join over 12 million people training smarter with JEFIT — the free workout tracker, gym log, and strength training planner built for Android.

WHAT USERS ARE SAYING

“Really helpful for the gym. gives good suggestions and makes it easy to log and see progress. the calendar view makes it easy to see what you did previous days as well. I will always use a tracker going forward.” – Stuart Norris

“Very useful app. You can create routine program, remember Weights you lifted last time…” – ammarimohamed

“The app is super reliable. I have been using it for over 6 years now. using the suggestions and following the exact form built in to this app, i have made huge progress reducing fat and building muscle” –  Amarprit Dhaliwal

“It is exactly what I was looking for. User-friendly. Detailed data entry possible, without being over-complicated.” – VeerleC01

CORE FEATURES

SMART LOGGING & WORKOUT PLANNER
•  Log your training with an intuitive, easy-to-use, and user-friendly interface
•  A library of 1,400+ exercises with HD video instructions and animations to help you nail your form
•  Build your own custom workouts, exercises, and personalized gym routines
•  Group exercises into supersets, and set a custom rest timer, stopwatch, or countdown for any exercise
•  Tag sets as warm-up, working, drop, or failure
•  Download and follow the built-in bodybuilding programs, fitness splits, and strength routines
•  Add notes and progress photos to any workout
•  Start an instant workout anywhere — set your time, equipment, and muscle focus, no fixed gym required

PERSONALIZED ADAPTIVE PLAN & PROGRESSIVE OVERLOAD
•  Adaptive Plan: a personalized training plan built around your goal, level, and equipment — powered by AI and backed by mesocycle and progressive overload science, so you just follow it, no guesswork, while it adapts every week as you progress
•  Built-in AI-powered progressive overload system: JEFIT’s smart AI analyzes your past workout logs to suggest exactly what weight and reps to lift next.

DEEP ANALYTICS & PROGRESS TRACKING
•  Track your progress with clear charts for volume, muscle focus, weekly sets per muscle, and movement balance
•  Get automatic One Rep Max (1RM) calculation for every exercise to visualize your strength growth
•  A detailed muscle map of your training – see what muscles you're focusing on
•  See a muscle recovery chart — decides which muscles are ready to train, and which still need rest
•  Track body weight, body fat, and measurements — waist, chest, arms, legs, and more

SMARTWATCH & ANDROID INTEGRATION
•  Live-sync your gym workout between JEFIT and your Wear OS smartwatch
•  Track your heart rate, sets, and calories burned as you train directly from your wrist
•  Add a home screen widget to jump straight into today's scheduled workout split

JEFIT ELITE
Upgrade to JEFIT Elite to unlock our most powerful, science-backed training tools designed to accelerate your results:
• Adaptive AI Coach
• Premium Analytics Dashboard
• Elite Routine Library
• Pro Training Tools

PRICING & SUBSCRIPTION DETAILS:
• Monthly: $12.99 / month
• Yearly: $69.99 / year (Save over 55%)

Charged to Google Play Account at purchase. Subscriptions auto-renew unless canceled at least 24 hours before the current period ends. Manage or turn off auto-renewal anytime in your Google Play Settings.

TERMS AND PRIVACY:
https://www.jefit.com/terms-of-use/
https://www.jefit.com/privacy-policy/

Download JEFIT today to start tracking your progress and crush your fitness goals!

Website: www.jefit.com
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jefitapp
Reddit: www.reddit.com/r/jefit/
Support: support@jefit.com
